title: Jodakan needler crab

The '''Jodakan needler crab''' came from the [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] of [[Jodaka]]. It was mainly known for its ability to create a needle made out of a paralyzing [[Poison/Legends|poison]] it produced and use the projectile to shoot down prey, including [[Bird/Legends|birds]] such as [[Gull/Legends|gulls]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Bowspritz]] conducted a monthlong study of these creatures before the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]]; entering his data into the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]] to update the centuries old information found there.

==Description==
The Jodakan needler crab was native to the [[Ocean/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Jodaka]], living in the rocky reefs above the oceans. A deadly [[Crustacean/Legends|crustacean]], its main prey was [[Gull/Legends|gulls]], which in turn would attempt to hunt the needler crab. Similar in look to the [[spider crab]] found on many other worlds, the needler crab had six legs, two pincers, two eyestalks that jutted out from the body and two feelers. The main distinction of the needler crab, however, was the hollow tube that ran the length of its back, jutting up from under the crab's shell. In the tube, the crab secreted a paralytic poison that solidified into a small [[Needler-barb|barb]]. The crab was then able contract air sacs at the end of the tube to fire the barb at passing gulls, poisoning them and claiming its prey. The needler crab could produce a barb every four [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], and would take any opportunity to down a flying [[Bird/Legends|bird]].<ref name="GUSWI" />

==History==
[[File:JodakanNeedlerCrab-TJP.jpg|thumb|left|A Jodakan needler-crab]]
Prior to the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Bowspritz]] spent a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] studying the needler crab on Jodaka. Bowspritz added the information to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]].<ref name="TJP" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], needler crabs were kept as pets by some individuals who had learned to fire the needler crab's dart on command by tapping the air sacs on the back of the creature. When away from Jodaka, owners needed to ensure that the crab spent at least four hours a day in a saltwater environment, and be fed a pound of meat a [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. The [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] merchant [[Glah Ubooki]] had a needler crab for sale in each of the eighteen shops run by the [[Ubooki brothers]] on various planets, and they sold for 250 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] each.<ref name="GUSWI" />
